title: Mapping the 2025–26 NBA Landscape: ELO Ratings, Advanced Metrics, and Team Clustering Analysis | by Sam Iyer-Sequeira | Football Applied | Medium
snippet: By integrating these statistics, the analysis illuminates how both efficiency and style, whether elite defense, rapid pace, or strategic scoring , combine to define team success. In this way, regression results and ELO ratings together reveal not just who wins, but why, painting a more complete portrait of NBA performance dynamics. ... The 2025–26 NBA landscape is best understood not through simple win-loss tallies but through the combination of advanced metrics, roster construction, and context
query: NBA advanced statistics 2025-26 season team ratings
